description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperMulti-coloured woven leather strap on the forefoot, with a wide side ankle and back ankle strap, and a buckled front ankle strap to lock the foot in placeLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with textured and grooved on the back heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
